description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant with long, slender, angular branches radiating outward from a central base. The branches are sharply pointed and have a geometric, almost spiky appearance, giving the plant a dramatic and modern look. The coloration is a muted, dark reddish-brown, suggesting either a dried or artificial plant. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the plant appears to be a simple, narrow stem. The overall form is sparse, with significant open space between the branches, and the plant lacks any visible leaves or flowers. The design is minimalist and would suit contemporary urban environments as a decorative accent.
description: A minimalist, spiky potted plant with long, angular reddish-brown branches radiating from a central base. The plant has a modern, geometric appearance and lacks visible leaves or a pot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's branches fanning out symmetrically from the center, with the longest branches extending horizontally.
description_view_1: This view highlights the angular spread of the branches, with some branches appearing more forward and others receding.
description_view_2: The branches are seen radiating outward, with the leftmost and rightmost branches extending further, emphasizing the plant's width.
description_view_3: A more vertical perspective, showing the central stem and the upward orientation of the branches, with less horizontal spread visible.
